new_text: Trading framework Phase 5 analysis. BACKTEST BUG: run_backtest() closes positions via SELL signals but executor.execute() only calls insert_trade() on submission, never close_trade() → all trades status='open' → get_win_rate() returns 0.0. FIX: after executor fills SELL, check if position closed → call journal.close_trade(). CONNECTORS: PaperConnector (0.1% fee, weighted-avg entry, deterministic, ready), BinanceConnector (ccxt, testnet=True, spot, 24/7, ready), AlpacaConnector (alpaca-py, paper=True, is_market_open via clock.is_open, ready). STRATEGIES: MACrossoverStrategy (crossover per-symbol buffer, Decimal), ClaudeStrategy (Haiku screens, Sonnet decides, thesis in metadata). JOURNAL: SQLite trades (id/symbol/side/quantity/entry_price/exit_price/pnl/strategy/gate_results/status/opened_at/closed_at). PORTFOLIO: Facade over connector+journal. GAPS: no equity_curve tracking, no realized vs unrealized P&L, no Sharpe/Calmar in Portfolio, no --run-live CLI flag, no position reconciliation after disconnect.

Trading Bot build spec (Session 343). DIRS: config/engine/connectors/strategies/gates/models/analysis/claude/journal/notifications/tests/docs. DEPS: ccxt/alpaca-py/pandas/numpy/pandas-ta/anthropic/sqlite3/decimal/python-telegram-bot. GATES (12): T1 hard (position 5%, daily loss -3%, insufficient balance, market closed); T2 discipline (thesis required, cooldown 3-losses/30min, max 5 positions, correlation 0.7, backtest proof); T3 advisory (unusual 2x size, off-hours, underperforming <40%/20 trades). CONNECTOR ABC: get_price/get_candles/submit_order/cancel_order/get_positions/get_balance/is_market_open. SCHEDULERS: CronScheduler Phase 1, IntervalScheduler Phase 2, StreamScheduler Phase 3. CLAUDE LAYERS: A=dev tool; B=Opus weekly $0.10/Sonnet daily $0.01; C=Haiku screen $0.001/Sonnet decide $0.01. GRADUATION: L0 paper+signal→L1 paper+fullauto→L2 real+signal→L3 real+semiauto→L4 real+fullauto. PHASE 1: models+PaperConnector+engine+gates 1,2,3,4,6,7+MA strategy+journal+console+backtester+pyproject.toml.

Safari iPad Picture-in-Picture limitations (Mar 2026). (1) canvas.captureStream() NOT supported in Safari iOS/iPad (WebKit Bug #181663) — blocks canvas→video→PiP entirely. (2) Safari PiP API is webkit-specific: webkitSupportsPresentationMode + webkitSetPresentationMode('picture-in-picture'|'inline'); standard requestPictureInPicture() not available; supported iPad Safari 9+, iPhone iOS 14+; NOT in Web App standalone mode. (3) DocumentPictureInPicture API NOT supported in any Safari (Chrome/Edge v116+ only, cannot do arbitrary HTML overlay). (4) Media Session API: basic metadata support, limited PiP integration. (5) PiP restricted to standard HTML5 <video> elements, no arbitrary HTML, floating controls limited. BOTTOM LINE: canvas-based overlays with dynamic content NOT feasible in Safari — only static HTML5 video can be placed in PiP.

coleam00 link-in-bio-page-builder research. TECH: Next.js 15, React 19, Neon Postgres, Drizzle ORM, Neon Auth, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, dnd-kit, Vitest, Vercel Agent Browser CLI E2E. TABLES: profiles, link_items, click_events. APPROACH: 34 sequential atomic tasks, 4 phases; local editor state with explicit save; 4 themes (Minimal/Dark/Colorful/Professional); live side-by-side preview. FILES: .claude/CLAUDE-template.md, .claude/PRD.md, .agents/plans/phase-1-*.md, .claude/commands/ (7: commit/create-prd/create-rules/execute/init-project/plan-feature/prime). CONTEXT SIZE: CLAUDE.md ~2k tokens, PRD ~5k, Phase 1 plan ~4k, commands ~2k total ≈ 10-15k baseline. QUALITY GATES: Biome lint, TypeScript strict, Vitest (3 coverage levels), Next.js build, E2E bash scripts. KEY FINDINGS: context engineering reduces rework 40-60%; ACE research 82.3% reduction in offline adaptation latency, 91.5% token cost reduction. DIFFERS from Torus: no persistent memory, no hook gate system, static PRD-driven. Static context via .claude/ vs Torus's live memory+state injection.

memory_server.py UDS socket + LanceDB write paths. SOCKET: /home/crab/.claude/hooks/.memory.sock. LIFECYCLE: _bind_uds_socket() (unlinks+creates AF_UNIX SOCK_STREAM, listen=8, timeout=1s); _start_socket_server() (spawns _accept_loop daemon, WATCHDOG on timeout checks if sock exists→rebind, REACTIVE on OSError→close+sleep1s+rebind); _cleanup_socket() (sets _uds_shutting_down=True, unlinks, atexit registered). CLIENT: memory_socket.py new socket per request, SOCKET_TIMEOUT=2s, circuit breaker. LANCEDB WRITES: upsert()→merge_insert().when_matched_update_all().when_not_matched_insert_all().execute(), fallback table.add(); delete()→table.delete('id IN (...)'); update()→fetch+merge+re-embed+merge_insert. KEY LINES: remember_this=2628, compact_digest=1690, flush_queue=1594, record_attempt=3056, record_outcome=3113. TAG INDEX: ~/.claude/memory/tags.db, threading.Lock, WAL mode; add_tags deletes+reinserts; no explicit lock on LanceDB merge_insert (relies on Rust backend). CONCURRENT RISK: backup via shutil.copytree() with active writes is unsafe.

Model profile toggle system (Session 262). CANONICAL SOURCE: config.json line 11 (model_profile='balanced'). DISPLAY: statusline.py reads config.json first, falls back to LIVE_STATE; 5 radio options: Quality/Balanced/Efficient/Lean/Budget. ENFORCEMENT: Gate 10 ONLY, reads via get_live_toggle('model_profile','balanced') checking config.json then LIVE_STATE. PROFILES (gate_10 lines 68-94): quality=opus/sonnet/opus/sonnet; balanced=opus/sonnet/sonnet/sonnet; efficient=opus/sonnet/sonnet/haiku; lean=opus/haiku/sonnet/haiku; budget=sonnet/haiku/sonnet/haiku (planning/research/execution/verification). ROLES: planning=Plan; research=Explore/researcher/claude-code-guide; execution=builder/general-purpose/Bash/debugger; verification=stress-tester/security/perf-analyzer. MECHANISM: gate_10 step 1c silently rewrites tool_input['model'], prints stderr notice, fail-open. GAP: subagent_type not in AGENT_ROLE_MAP→silently skipped. STALE: gate_10 line 42 says LIVE_STATE is canonical (wrong, config.json is).

/health-report skill (Session Self-Sprint-2). FILES: skills/health-report/SKILL.md, skills/health-report/scripts/report.py. FEATURES: (1) full_health_check(session_id='main') — gates status+import verify, memory MCP reachability+knowledge count, state file validity, ramdisk, audit logs; (2) gate effectiveness from .gate_effectiveness.json (prevention rate, top blockers); (3) test pass/fail from LIVE_STATE.json; (4) known_issues categorized (platform_limitation/performance/data_quality/integration/configuration); (5) --brief (exec summary only), --export (saves .md+.json to ~/.claude/). SHARED MODULES: shared.health_monitor.full_health_check, shared.circuit_breaker.get_all_gate_states (optional). OUTPUT: markdown (Executive Summary/Component Status/Test Results/Gate Effectiveness/Known Issues/Recommendations), icons ✓/⚠/✗, tables for metrics. CLI: python3 scripts/report.py [--brief|--export]. TESTED: 67/100 health score, all modes working.

Eclipse-agave RPC method guide (rpc/src/rpc.rs, 9135 lines). STRUCTURE: rpc_minimal(2712-2950), rpc_bank(2951-3165), rpc_accounts(3166-3301), rpc_accounts_scan(3302-3479), rpc_full::Full trait(3486-3638)+FullImpl(3640-4293). ADD METHOD: (1) add trait signature before line 3638: #[rpc(meta, name='camelCaseName')] fn snake_case(&self, meta: Self::Metadata, ...) -> Result<...>; (2) add impl before line 4293; (3) bank access: meta.get_bank_with_config(config) or meta.bank(commitment); (4) wrap: new_response(bank, value) for slot context. REGISTRATION: automatic via macro, io.extend_with(FullImpl.to_delegate()) in rpc_service.rs:491-498. METADATA: JsonRpcRequestProcessor{bank_forks,blockstore,cluster_info,health,...}. RESPONSE TYPES: RpcResponse<T> (context+slot), Vec<T>, BoxFuture. IMPORTS: jsonrpc_derive::rpc, solana_rpc_client_api::response::*, solana_runtime::bank::Bank. TEMPLATE: getFeeForMessage at trait:3617-3623 + impl:4237-4261.
